reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 3.9% and 20-day momentum is 26.3%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 12.1% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.4%, downside volatility near 0.8%, and a recent max drawdown of 2.7%.
Volume confirmation is -8.8% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 1.5% versus SPY over 5 days and 3.7% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.87, confidence 0.83, and 0.6 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.87, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 2 articles across 2 sources, 0.6 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.91, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.83.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.03).
Overall model score is 0.251 with high confidence.
